title: Claude Devkit Score Dimensions
description: Configurable scoring dimensions for skill run evaluation. v1: dimensions are hardcoded in compute-run-score.sh; this file serves as documentation and future machine-readable configuration.

notes.weight_convention: Active dimension weights should sum to ~1.0 (excluding velocity which has weight 0.0). compute-run-score.sh normalizes weights at runtime, so non-unit sums produce correct composites but non-standard individual weighted contributions.
notes.efficiency_coupling: The efficiency formula (1.0 - revision_count * 0.4) assumes /ship max revision count is 2. If /ship increases this limit, review the formula.
notes.schema_gap: run_end.revision_rounds and run_end.steps_completed are defined in audit-event-schema.json but NOT emitted by any skill coordinator. Efficiency is derived from code_review verdict count instead (verdict_count - 1 = revision rounds).

dimensions.name: efficiency
dimensions.description: How clean was the implementation? Fewer revision rounds = better.
dimensions.source: verdict events where verdict_source == 'code_review' (count - 1 = revision rounds)
dimensions.scoring: Count code_review verdict events. 1 verdict = 0 rounds = 1.0, 2 verdicts = 1 round = 0.6, 3 verdicts = 2 rounds = 0.2. Formula: max(0.0, 1.0 - (count - 1) * 0.4)

dimensions.name: security
dimensions.description: Security gate outcomes. Penalizes BLOCKED and PASS_WITH_NOTES verdicts.

dimensions.name: quality
dimensions.description: Code review and QA outcomes. Uses first code review verdict (pre-revision) and final QA verdict.
dimensions.scoring: Start 1.0. CR REVISION_NEEDED: -0.3, CR FAIL: -0.5, QA PASS_WITH_NOTES: -0.1, QA FAIL: -0.5, floor 0.0

dimensions.name: velocity
dimensions.description: Wall-clock run duration in minutes. Informational only (not in composite).
dimensions.source: run_start.timestamp to current time (run_score is emitted before run_end)
